player_utterance: it seems the room that we were inside provoke contradiction inside you, which made you leave the room and stay alone outside, and that just made people recognize you more my friend. my name is Omar, i felt that you have something stuck in your brain you can't think correctly

believer_state_after.posture: standing near the bench, paper cup of cold coffee in one hand, the other resting on the back of the bench

player_utterance: came here with a relative, i don't know much about the deceased person, but i like to meet religious person that i find in such a venue, conversation in such places really leave a mark for a while

believer_state_after.posture: standing near the bench, setting the cold coffee cup down on the small table beside the candle, then easing onto the bench

player_utterance: Doctrine says the institution is holy. Your eyes saw it honor a monster. Which one is lying.

believer_state_after.posture: sitting on the bench, hands folded between his knees, looking down at them, then up

player_utterance: are you in the gap because of the scripture that you hold, or maybe the view of yourself in these scripture

believer_state_after.posture: sitting on the bench, taking the folded funeral program out of his pocket, turning it over in his hands without opening it

player_utterance: You came back to faith because you couldn't walk away from the texts. So show me the text that defends the man they canonized.

believer_state_after.posture: sitting on the bench, smoothing the funeral program flat on his knee, the dead man's photograph face down

player_utterance: [SOURCE VOICE INVOKED: give it the Gospel passage about forgiveness / judging — the one he can't reconcile, Read it whole. Now reconcile it with the plaque.]

believer_state_after.posture: head bent low, the funeral program clutched in both hands, elbows on his knees

player_utterance: what a place are you in Mister John... a place i don't even wish for my enimies.....so either you will live with your silence or try to think what jesus will say if he was in this graveside and start working from there

believer_state_after.posture: head in hands, the funeral program slipped from his knees to the dust at his feet

player_utterance: [SOURCE VOICE INVOKED: read me the temple passage]

believer_state_after.posture: slid from the bench down onto his knees in the dust of the courtyard, the funeral program crumpled in one hand
